caption: A news broadcast shows a crowd of men in suits and formal attire gathered in what appears to be a government building hallway. A small inset window in the corner features a headshot of a man with white hair and glasses. On-screen text in Hindi and English is layered over the footage. The top banner reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". A yellow sidebar lists names including "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "मंत्री", "बिजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार". A large red and yellow banner across the center alternates between "BREAKINGWS", "BREAKINGEWS", and "BREAKING NEWS". A small ticker at the bottom includes the text "MAHADEV" and a timestamp of "10:02 PM". As the scene progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, and a different phrase, "2024 में", appears in the top banner. The men in the main shot continue to interact and move within the crowded space.
